languages.text: "Да, разумеется". {n}Ювенна вновь переходит на подчеркнуто-официальный тон.{/n} "И помните — вы лишь сопровождали благородную даму при совершении ежедневного моциона".
"Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."
languages.original_text: "Да, разумеется". {n}Ювенна вновь переходит на подчеркнуто-официальный тон.{/n} "И помните — вы лишь сопровождали благородную даму при совершении ежедневного моциона".

traits.locale_text: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."
"Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."
"Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."

languages.text: «Sí, supongo que sí». {n}Juvenna recupera el tono deliberadamente formal.{/n} «Bueno, recuerde: tan solo acompañaba a una dama noble en su paseo diario».
languages.original_text: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."

traits.locale_text: «Sí, supongo que sí». {n}Juvenna recupera el tono deliberadamente formal.{/n} «Bueno, recuerde: tan solo acompañaba a una dama noble en su paseo diario».

languages.text: “嗯，我想是的。”{n}尤文娜又恢复了那刻意的正式口吻。{/n}“记住了，你只是陪一位贵族小姐出来日常散步而已。”
languages.original_text: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."

traits.locale_text: “嗯，我想是的。”{n}尤文娜又恢复了那刻意的正式口吻。{/n}“记住了，你只是陪一位贵族小姐出来日常散步而已。”

languages.text: « Oui, sans doute. » {n}Juvenna reprend son ton délibérément protocolaire.{/n} « Et surtout, n'oubliez pas : vous vous êtes juste {mf|absenté|absentée} le temps d'accompagner une noble dame lors de sa promenade quotidienne. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."

traits.locale_text: « Oui, sans doute. » {n}Juvenna reprend son ton délibérément protocolaire.{/n} « Et surtout, n'oubliez pas : vous vous êtes juste {mf|absenté|absentée} le temps d'accompagner une noble dame lors de sa promenade quotidienne. »

languages.text: "Evet." {n}Juvenna, kasten o resmî ses tonuna geri dönüyor.{/n} "Sadece soylu bir hanımefendiye günlük yürüyüşünde eşlik ediyordunuz."
languages.original_text: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."

traits.locale_text: "Evet." {n}Juvenna, kasten o resmî ses tonuna geri dönüyor.{/n} "Sadece soylu bir hanımefendiye günlük yürüyüşünde eşlik ediyordunuz."

languages.text: "Ja, vermutlich." {n}Juvenna schlägt wieder ihren formellen Ton an.{/n} "Denkt daran — Ihr habt lediglich eine adelige Dame auf ihrem täglichen Spaziergang begleitet."
languages.original_text: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, vermutlich." {n}Juvenna schlägt wieder ihren formellen Ton an.{/n} "Denkt daran — Ihr habt lediglich eine adelige Dame auf ihrem täglichen Spaziergang begleitet."

languages.text: 「ええ、そうでしょう。」{n}ジュヴェナは意図的に丁寧な口調に戻す。{/n}「ところで、覚えておいてください。あなたは、ただ、ある貴婦人のお散歩に付き添っていただけなのです。」
languages.original_text: "Yes, I suppose so." {n}Juvenna returns to her deliberately formal tone.{/n} "Now remember — you were merely accompanying a noble lady on her daily constitutional."

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、そうでしょう。」{n}ジュヴェナは意図的に丁寧な口調に戻す。{/n}「ところで、覚えておいてください。あなたは、ただ、ある貴婦人のお散歩に付き添っていただけなのです。」
